⌂ Home ›

ASEAN Data Monitoring & Evaluation Workspace

A unified evidence base for the ASEAN Socio-Cultural Community — bringing together initiative tracking, outcome-document follow-up, and socio-cultural statistics across 10 Member States, 15 sectoral bodies, and the strategic measures of the ASCC Blueprint.

DATABASE A & B · THREE MODULES LIVE
DATABASE A

Initiatives & Outcome Documents

● LIVE📊
ASCC Initiatives Dashboard
Portfolio monitoring of sectoral-body activities across workplan cycles — delivery performance, strategic-pillar alignment, and a filterable activity monitor.
63Activities
4Zones
15Bodies
Open Initiatives →
● LIVE📑
Outcome Documents Dashboard
Executive view of ASCC declarations, statements and conventions — Member-State follow-up coverage on an interactive map, distribution by sectoral body, and SDG mapping.
12Declarations
10Member States
17SDG

COMING SOON🎓
Learning Management System
Capacity-building courses, learner journeys and progress tracking for ASEAN Secretariat staff and sectoral-body focal points. In development.
—Courses
5Roles
Preview →
Prototype note. The three live modules are interactive prototypes populated with representative sample data. They render exactly as built by the development team — this workspace wraps them with a shared login and navigation layer so the modules of Database A and Database B can be reviewed together in one journey. LMS, Outcome Stories and Support are planned modules shown here as placeholders.
🎓
In Development

Learning Management System

The ADME LMS will deliver capacity-building content and track learner progress across five user roles, integrated with the main platform through single sign-on.

  • Role-based course catalogues (Admin, Content Manager, Contributor, Focal Point, Guest)
  • Progress tracking, badges and completion records
  • Single sign-on shared with the ADME platform
📖
In Development

Outcome Stories

A narrative layer over the monitoring data — curated stories that show how ASCC initiatives and outcome documents translate into real change across Member States.

  • Story cards linked to initiatives and outcome documents
  • Member-State and sector filtering
  • Media-rich case studies for reporting and outreach
🛟
In Development

Support

The support module will provide a help desk, documentation and a ticketing system for ADME users across the ASEAN Secretariat and sectoral bodies.

  • Searchable knowledge base and user guides
  • Ticketing with SLA-bound response times
  • Role-specific onboarding material
